content: Remote OK Administrative Coordinator UppalCorp <p><strong>Company Description</strong></p><p><br></p><p>UppalCorp specializes in commodities sourcing, trade, and management consulting, leveraging a dynamic team of digital innovators. Our passionate industry experts provide strategic guidance in sourcing, performance improvement, and international trade. We are committed to empowering businesses with tailored solutions for complex decision-making. At UppalCorp, we value growth, collaboration, and innovation to make a global impact.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Role Description</strong></p><p><br></p><p>This is a full-time remote role for an Administrative Coordinator with occasional business travel as required. The Administrative Coordinator will manage daily administrative tasks, maintain schedules, coordinate communication, and provide clerical support to executives. Responsibilities include organizing documentation, scheduling meetings, managing calls, and ensuring smooth office operations, tailored to support the needs of a dynamic team.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><p><br></p><ul><li>Proven experience in an administrative, executive support, or similar role; prior experience supporting executives is considered an asset.</li><li>Proficiency in administrative assistance, clerical functions, calendar management, and task coordination.</li><li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with strong professional phone etiquette and interpersonal abilities.</li><li>Exceptional organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize multiple tasks, manage competing deadlines, and work independently in a fast-paced remote environment.</li><li>High level of accuracy, attention to detail, and commitment to maintaining efficient administrative processes.</li><li>Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and other common office software, collaboration tools, and technology platforms.</li><li>Strong professional judgment, integrity, and discretion when handling confidential and commercially sensitive information, with a demonstrated ability to safeguard proprietary business, financial, and operational data.</li><li>Ability to collaborate effectively with executives, internal teams, and external stakeholders while maintaining professionalism and confidentiality.</li><li>Willingness and ability to travel occasionally for https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-administrative-coordinator-uppalcorp-1132901 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Freelance UGC Creators Wanted re:act Here at re:act we're looking for freelance UGC creators across the UK to join our growing creator network and work with a variety of exciting brands.<br><br>To be considered, please send:<br><br><ul><li>A link to your portfolio or examples of previous work </li><li>Your fee per video - due to expected high interest, we will not be entering into price negotiations so please do share your best and final price per video </li><li>Details of any particular niches or specialist areas you focus on <br><br></li></ul>We're keen to hear from creators with a variety of styles, interests, and experiences. If you're reliable, creative, and enjoy producing engaging content, we'd love to see your work!<br><br><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong>What we're looking for:<br><br><ul><li>Creators who can appear on camera and feature in their own content </li><li>Strong understanding of current social media trends and UGC styles </li><li>Creative flair to develop your own concepts to fit an of-the-moment trend to a specific brand </li><li>Highly-skilled in creating, filming and editing high-quality but social-first content for a variety of brands and categories </li><li>Ability to reliably deliver content within a 48-hour turnaround window </li><li>Access to a range of different filming environments to help keep content fresh and engaging </li><li>UK-based creators - we are looking for people of all ages, genders, personalities and styles! <br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong>What we provide:<br><br><ul><li>All products supplied in advance </li><li>Opportunities to create content for a diverse range of brands </li><li>Potential for ongoing, regular collaboration</li></ul> video, content writing, non tech London, London, England, United Kingdom 2026-06-05T14:38:34+00:00 1132875 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-freelance-ugc-creators-wanted-react-1132875 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png General Practitioner Telehealth Case Conferencing Clinic Proactive Health <p></p><p>Are you a GP looking for meaningful, flexible clinical work â one day in clinic, one day remote, without the full-time grind?</p><p>Veteran Pathways &amp; Proactive Care is seeking experienced General Practitioners to deliver chronic disease management and structured multidisciplinary case conferencing for veterans and patients with complex, multi-system health needs. The role runs across two structured days each week â an in-clinic day at our Ipswich partner practice and a remote telehealth case-conferencing day â with some flexibility on the days to suit you.</p><p>This is not a standard locum. You will provide clinical leadership within integrated Chronic Care Teams, working alongside allied health professionals and specialists to translate clinical findings into coordinated, evidence-based care plans. The work is structured, purposeful and genuinely multidisciplinary â a system that values thorough, evidence-based care over high-volume throughput.</p><p></p>Remuneration<p>First 3 Months (Guaranteed) = $240.00 per hour</p><p>After 3 Months = 70% of billings</p><ul><ul><li>Structured as an independent contractor arrangement.</li><li>Bulk-billing model across Medicare and DVA billing streams.</li><li>Sign-on bonus and anniversary incentive available (details on enquiry).</li><li>Ipswich is a DPA-eligible location â GPs with a 19AB exemption, including international medical graduates, are welcome to apply</li></ul></ul><p></p>Location &amp; working options<p>In-clinic day (Tuesday): an 8-hour clinic day at a well-established allied-health practice and a natural multidisciplinary home for chronic-care work.</p><p>Remote case-conferencing day (Thursday): an 8-hour telehealth case-conferencing session, delivered from your home office (a suitable space and reliable internet are all thatâs required). There is some flexibility on which days these fall, arranged around your availability.</p><p> </p>The Role<p>As a General Practitioner within our Chronic Care Team model, you will provide clinical leadership across in-clinic consultations and structured telehealth case conferencing:</p><ul><li>Conduct comprehensive GP consultations for acute, chronic and complex conditions within a Chronic Care Team framework (in-clinic and/or by telehealth).</li><li>Deliver preventative health ass
